name: Association Gaps Audit
prompt: Audit contacts/deals/companies for missing required associations. Report orphan records by type, top causes, and recommended fixes.

name: Property Usage Audit
prompt: Audit contact/company/deal properties for duplicates, near-duplicates, deprecated fields, and fill rate below 30%. Rank by cleanup impact.

name: Owner Distribution Audit
prompt: Analyze owner distribution across active contacts/deals/tasks. Flag over-assigned owners, inactivity, and rebalance recommendations.

name: Lifecycle Accuracy Audit
prompt: Audit lifecycle stage accuracy based on recent activity and deal status. Identify mismatches and suggest corrected stage transitions.
